violations.description: A hard latency threshold based on process wall-clock can be sensitive to host noise in shared CI runners.
violations.suggestion: Use percentile/service-timing-based budget checks or add controlled tolerance for CI jitter.

violations.description: Each scenario re-creates mapping/setup independently; this is safe but increases suite runtime and boilerplate.
violations.suggestion: Use scoped reusable setup helpers where safe to reduce repeated overhead.

performance_metrics.avg_test_duration_estimate: < 1.5 min target appears achievable; not executed in this review run
slow_tests: Potential CI outliers for duplicate-burst latency budget assertions

recommendations: Keep Promise.all burst strategy and avoid serial mode
Tune latency budget checks for CI jitter resistance
Consolidate repeated setup paths where practical
summary: Performance posture is generally good; main risk is CI-host variance around strict latency assertions.
